title: Associate Staff Engineer, Agentic AI
description:
Company Description

We are a Digital Product Engineering company that is scaling
in a big way! We build products, services, and experiences
that inspire, excite, and delight. We work at scale across
all devices and digital mediums, and our people exist
everywhere in the world (17500+ experts across 39 countries,
to be exact). Our work culture is dynamic and non-
hierarchical. We're looking for great new colleagues. That's
where you come in!

Job Description

REQUIREMENTS:

- Total experience 4+ years.
- Must have deep research expertise, hands-on system
  prototyping, and the ability to translate novel ideas into
  scalable, production-ready AI systems.
- Must have exposure to any of these topics Agentic AI &
  Multi-Agent Systems, Knowledge Graphs & Neuro-Symbolic
  Reasoning, Agentic Memory Systems, LLMs & Advanced
  Reasoning
- Should be able to lead end-to-end research projects from
  problem formulation to evaluation
- Should be able to develop prototypes and reference
  implementations demonstrating novel ideas
- Should be able to balance exploratory research with applied,
  product-oriented innovation
- Should be able to contribute to long-term research roadmaps
  aligned with business goals
- Must publish research in top-tier conferences and journals
  (e.g., CAI, NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR, AAAI, ACL, EMNLP, IJCAI,
  KDD, JMLR)
- Should be able to file patents and technical disclosures
  based on research outcomes
- Should be able to contribute to internal whitepapers and
  technical strategy documents
- Should work closely with engineering teams to transition
  research prototypes into scalable systems
- Should be able to design experiments and benchmarks on real-
  world datasets
- Should be able to influence platform architecture decisions
  for agentic AI systems
- Should be able to mentor junior researchers and research
  engineers
- Should be able to collaborate across research, platform, and
  product teams
- Should be able to review papers, proposals, and experimental
  designs
- Must be PhD in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning or
  related field from tier 1 institute

RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Understanding the client’s business use cases and technical
  requirements and be able to convert them into technical
  design which elegantly meets the requirements.
- Mapping decisions with requirements and be able to translate
  the same to developers.
- Identifying different solutions and being able to narrow
  down the best option that meets the clients’ requirements.
- Defining guidelines and benchmarks for NFR considerations
  during project implementation.
- Writing and reviewing design document explaining overall
  architecture, framework, and high-level design of the
  application for the developers.
- Reviewing architecture and design on various aspects like
  extensibility, scalability, security, design patterns,
  user experience, NFRs, etc., and ensure that all relevant
  best practices are followed.
- Developing and designing the overall solution for defined
  functional and non-functional requirements; and defining
  technologies, patterns, and frameworks to materialize it.
- Understanding and relating technology integration scenarios
  and applying these learnings in projects.
- Resolving issues that are raised during code/review, through
  exhaustive systematic analysis of the root cause, and
  being able to justify the decision taken.
- Carrying out POCs to make sure that suggested
  design/technologies meet the requirements.

Qualifications

Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science,
Information Technology, or a related field.
responsibilities: Lead end-to-end research projects from problem formulation to evaluation, translating novel ideas into scalable AI systems
Develop prototypes and reference implementations demonstrating novel agentic AI concepts and technologies
Publish research in top-tier conferences and journals, file patents, and contribute to technical whitepapers
Work closely with engineering teams to transition research prototypes into scalable production systems
Design experiments and benchmarks on real-world datasets and influence platform architecture decisions
Understand client business use cases and convert them into technical designs that elegantly meet requirements
Develop overall solution architectures including technologies, patterns, and frameworks for functional and non-functional requirements
Conduct POCs to validate that suggested designs and technologies meet client requirements
use_cases: Agentic AI systems with multi-agent capabilities for autonomous problem-solving
Knowledge graphs and neuro-symbolic reasoning for complex inference tasks
Agentic memory systems for maintaining context and state across interactions
Advanced LLM-based reasoning applications for enterprise clients
Research-to-production AI systems in Digital Product Engineering contexts
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role focuses on building, prototyping, and deploying
Agentic AI systems including multi-agent systems, knowledge
graphs, agentic memory, and LLMs. It requires hands-on work
translating research into production-ready AI systems and
directly working with novel AI technologies.
